message:
test(mux_pool): add pre-cancelled Cx counter regression suite (ft-2h5wv.6)

Add 7 tests covering pre-cancelled Cx behavior with comprehensive
counter assertions. Key regressions verified:

- recovery ENABLED + pre-cancelled Cx still fast-fails (no retry)
  for get_lines, write_to_pane, and send_paste
- multi-operation accumulation: 3 sequential pre-cancelled ops
  produce zero side-effects across all 13 counter fields
- pre-cancelled ops after a successful operation leave idle
  connections and counters completely undisturbed
- get_pane_render_changes and batch render paths also fast-fail
  on pre-cancelled Cx with zero resource consumption

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
